/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,@/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.12/lib/python3.12/site-packages/nanobind/cmake/darwin-ld-cpython.sym -Wl,-dead_strip -Wl,-x -Wl,-S -o hex9_ext.cpython-312-darwin.so CMakeFiles/hex9_ext.dir/python/hex9_ext.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ben/Documents/Projects/GeoPlegma/libhex9/build-l30 libnanobind-static.a libhex9.0.1.0.dylib
